basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Roorkee. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Roorkee Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Research Associate (For conducting model test and prototype testing for Ultra low head turbine): M. Tech in Civil/Electrical/Mechanical/Hydropower Engineering plus one-year experience in turbine / pump or similar equipment testing in the laboratory and field and coordination. Research Associate (For assessment of potential of ultra-low head sites): M. Tech in Civil/Agriculture/Water Resources or in related area, preferably having experience on existing water structures like outfall structure of water and waste water treatment plants, canals.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Research Associate (For conducting model test and prototype testing for Ultra low head turbine)
Research Associate (For assessment of potential of ultra-low head sites)

salary_details.details: The salary for the Research Associate position ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 75,000 Per Month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate posts at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate positions at IIT Roorkee is 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Research Associate posts announced by IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for the Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Research Associate position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 75,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is M. Tech in relevant engineering or science fields, along with specific experience as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Research Associate position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their complete application via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these Research Associate positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate positions at IIT Roorkee will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for the Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit for these Research Associate positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Research Associate positions?
faq.answer: The Research Associate positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is available in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
